subject: [PATCH 1/6] selftests/liveupdate: add framework for memfd tests

reviews.author: Usama Arif
reviews.summary: Raised concerns about unused variables (LIVEUPDATE_DEV) and inconsistent error handling (strerror(errno)).

2026-03-10.patch_summary: Patch introduces a framework for memfd tests in selftests/liveupdate, but reviewer raises concerns about unused variables and inconsistent error handling.
